name: Healthcare Administration Certificate
description: Prepare for leadership roles in healthcare settings. Learn healthcare operations, compliance, and management fundamentals.

name: Business Administration Associate Degree
description: Build foundational business skills including accounting, management, and organizational behavior.

name: Data Analytics Bootcamp
description: Master data analysis, visualization, and SQL. Learn to turn data into actionable business insights.

name: Project Management Professional (PMP) Prep
description: Comprehensive preparation for PMP certification. Covers all knowledge areas and process groups.

name: Bachelor's in Information Technology
description: Comprehensive IT degree covering networking, security, databases, and software development.

name: MBA - General Management
description: Accelerate your leadership career with a flexible MBA program. Focus on strategy, finance, and organizational leadership.

name: High School Equivalency (GED)
description: Prepare for and earn your high school equivalency diploma. Foundational step for career advancement.

name: English Language Learning (ESL)
description: Improve English proficiency for workplace success. Covers speaking, writing, and professional communication.

name: Healthcare Career Pathway
description: Progress from entry-level to licensed healthcare roles. Includes certifications, clinical training, and degree options.

name: Technology Career Pathway
description: Build skills from IT fundamentals to software development or cybersecurity specialization.

name: Supply Chain & Logistics Pathway
description: Advance from warehouse operations to supply chain management. Includes certifications and leadership training.

name: Retail to Management Pathway
description: Develop leadership skills to move from frontline retail to store and district management.

name: Finance & Accounting Pathway
description: Build accounting fundamentals through CPA preparation. Includes bookkeeping, financial analysis, and audit skills.

name: HR Professional Pathway
description: Develop HR expertise from fundamentals to strategic business partnership. Includes SHRM certification prep.
